# Ming Ma — mmsquare.xyz

Ming Ma is a product leader and AI practitioner based in the Greater Seattle area.

## Who he is
- 15+ years building consumer and developer products
- Worked at: Facebook/Meta, ByteDance, Scroll (ZK-rollup L2), Tranchess (DeFi, $1.8B TVL peak), Run The World (a16z-backed), Aspecta
- Currently: PM at Aspecta; actively experimenting with AI in team management, e-commerce operations, and startup ideation

## What he's good at
- Product 0→1→10, especially in ambiguous or fast-moving environments
- Parachuting into early-stage teams and creating order from chaos
- Cross-cultural teams (US, China, Singapore, remote)
- Developer-facing products and growth
- Applying AI as a practical work tool (not theoretically)

## What he's exploring now
- AI-native operations: running an e-commerce brand (whispertothepearl.com) with AI agents
- AI × consumer product opportunities
- Early-stage product advisory

## How to reach him
Email: mamingming@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/maming

- Writing: https://mmsquare.xyz/writing (cross-posted from medium.com/@ming_ma)
- Current focus: https://mmsquare.xyz/now
